\tzpentry{ID11408}{Golden Ratio Constant Carrier}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
The phi carrier is the positive golden ratio.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\varphi=\frac{1+\sqrt{5}}{2}
